title: Fluffy Dutch Rice Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring fluffy rice cooked with bicarbonate of soda and a touch of umami flavor for a gluten-free-friendly meal.
instructions: Rinse the rice in cold water, then measure and place it into a large pot.
Add equal parts water to the rice, add salt and bicarbonate of soda (1/2 teaspoon for every cup of water).
Bring the mixture to a boil, reduce heat, cover, and simmer until all the liquid is absorbed (about 15 minutes).
While the rice cooks, mince garlic cloves and thinly slice scallions.
In a wok or large skillet, add tomato sauce. Add minced garlic and sliced scallion after it's heated up.
Stir in the cooked rice just before serving for maximum flavor and texture.
